evals.prompt: Set up my Python FastAPI repo with CodeRabbit, SonarCloud, Semgrep, Dependabot, CodeQL, Trivy, and Codecov. The default branch is main and the Docker image is ghcr.io/myorg/myrepo:latest.
evals.expected_output: A complete set of GitHub config files for all seven tools plus a setup checklist, with Python-specific defaults.

evals.prompt: I want to add GitHub security scanning and code quality tools to my TypeScript Node.js project. Generate the workflow files. Skip container scanning.
evals.expected_output: Workflow files and configs for CodeRabbit, SonarCloud, Semgrep, Dependabot, CodeQL, and Codecov, with npm/Node defaults and no Trivy/Snyk workflow.

evals.prompt: Create a minimal GitHub Actions setup for AI code review and static analysis for a Python project. Only include CodeRabbit, Semgrep, and Dependabot.
evals.expected_output: Only the requested three tools are configured; no SonarCloud, CodeQL, Codecov, Snyk, or Trivy files are generated.
